column8: EA TGQ codec 8x8 IDCT dispatcher; calls IDCT_1D_8pt_Float 8x rows + 8x cols; orig caller chain ParseJPEGHeaders/IDCTDecode16x16Block; no port equivalent per td5_fmv.c:1044 ARCH-DIVERGENCE: FMV
EA TGQ codec quant-table lookup over DAT_004811b0 array; only used by JPEG/IDCT decoder pipeline; no port equivalent per td5_fmv.c:1045 ARCH-DIVERGENCE: FMV
EA TGQ codec bitstream IDCT DC/AC coefficient decoder; uses DAT_004d3600 block buffer + DAT_004d3820 dequant; no port equivalent per td5_fmv.c:1046 ARCH-DIVERGENCE: FMV
EA TGQ codec YCbCr→16bpp packed pixel converter; called by IDCTDecode16x16Block + DecodeMCU_YCbCr422_8bpp; no port equivalent per td5_fmv.c:1047 ARCH-DIVERGENCE: FMV
EA TGQ codec YCbCr→RGB565 row converter; called by DecodeJPEGFrame + DecodeMCU_YCbCr422_16bpp_Fast; no port equivalent per td5_fmv.c:1048 ARCH-DIVERGENCE: FMV
